brand.name: daquii
brand.tagline_pt: Tudo o que você precisa, daqui.
brand.meaning: Daquii means from here. The brand is about people and services from here, not places on a map.
brand.authoritative_reference: Use daquii_authoritative_brand_reference.png as the visual source of truth.

tropical_pink.usage: Primary pop accent, word emphasis, gradient start, badges

sunset_orange.usage: Warm accent, gradient midpoint, premium highlights

ocean_teal.usage: Primary CTA, links, active states, palm mark, positive states

deep_navy.usage: Wordmark, headings, body text, nav, high trust UI

typography.wordmark_style: lowercase, rounded, bold, deep navy, similar to the reference board

logo_rules.mark: organic island outline with palm tree inside
forbidden: Do not use the abstract D-with-people logo
Do not use the handshake logo
Do not use a location pin logo
Do not add the exterior decorative dot beside the island outline
Do not use a capital D
Do not mute or pastel-wash the palette
must_match: Bright pink, orange, teal island outline
Teal palm tree inside the mark
Two coloured i dots: teal and pink
